case_title: KING WENDELL VS PATEL LIVING TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO PATEL LIVING TRUST, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE (OUT OF COUNTY).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING WENDELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL LIVING TRUST PATEL SUDHIL (SAM) ENTELLA HOTEL BAHKTA SATISH (SAM)-ALTAMONT HOTEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, DEFECT IN SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
